Feign Death  

Description

1: Feign Death, 87% Success Rate

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 60 Skill: Abjuration
Casting Time: 1.5 Recast Time: 15
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Self Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso dies.
Effect Fades: You no longer appear dead.

Game Description

Causes you to stop breathing and appear dead to most creatures.

Items with this effect

  • Blood Ember Greaves
  • Coterie Mask of the Dead
  • Crimson Ring of Desinence
  • Spell: Feign Death [storebought]
  • Spell: Feign Death [Necromancer]
  • Vermilion Sky Ring

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Feign Death
Spell: Feign Death
ClassLevel
SHD24
NEC16
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (27)
  • Scroll 1 Sold By (12)
  • Screenshots (1)
Post Comment
game message
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2010 at 11:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591905976753
13 posts
a note for any that may be curious game message is

"name... has fallen to the ground"

occurs on a failed cast and if you link this to an audio trigger comes in handy.
▲ Page top
Vendor availability
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2007 at 9:57 PM Rating: Good
-REDACTED-
Sage
76 posts
This spell is also available in Abysmal Sea from SK spell vendor Daris Rodril for 3 pp 7 gp 5 sp for a level 29 Dark Elf SK with a cha of 65.
▲ Page top
Feign Death & Comatose
QuoteReply
# Aug 18 2006 at 8:55 PM Rating: Decent
Ebelch
View User Forum
626 posts
Memming Feign Death & Comatose at the same time can come in handy when you are being owned by casters (or if you feel your going to be in the near future ).

Question
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2004 at 3:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802688176
13 posts
Does this spell and comatose work while on drog/horse?

Thanks in advance

▲ Page top
RE: Question
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2006 at 4:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591895311842
19 posts
yes it does... if u cast FD on a mount or anything.. it will make the mount disapear but then make u FD.. if u have DMF on or something.. it u will look funny but don't stand up if it doesn't fail.. you'll still be FD =)
▲ Page top
Raising abjure.....
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2004 at 2:11 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1679271392283
Scholar
308 posts
To all young SKs- to raise your Abjuration easily and painlessly, you can chain cast Resist Cold on yourself or any random target. Relatively cheap and quick cast, and you can even drop it in a spell slot during fights if you aren't the main puller and cast between pulls.
▲ Page top
Pok vendor
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2004 at 8:49 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759028990
54 posts
▲ Page top
RE: Pok vendor
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2004 at 8:51 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592759028990
54 posts
I found this on Reaver Thirlan in the POK Shadow Knight Area....I"m to lazy to travel much to find spells.
▲ Page top
Turn Attack Off....
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2003 at 11:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767553892
5 posts
When you cast this spell or when you use FD as a monk attack must be off before this will work.....
▲ Page top
RE: Turn Attack Off....
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2004 at 11:00 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592257278576
Scholar
53 posts
I can't speak for Necro or SK FD, but I know for a fact attack does not have to be turned off in order for FD to work for, at the very least, monks. As a matter of fact, I've actualy FD'd, accidently swung at a mob right after from lag, and still had agro cleared. I was no longer laying on the ground, but agro was still gone.
▲ Page top
RE: Turn Attack Off....
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2004 at 11:36 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591804865527
17 posts
Create the following hotkey for FD:

/attack off
/pause 2 (i use 4)
/doability # (whatever FD is set to)

works almost every time to stop attacking long enough to keep FD from failing as much. sure you can FD while attacking but i've always heard that increases the failure percentage and that you should stop attacking first and then execute the FD.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Sharthis Razorspine
Disciple of the 54th Teaching
Loyal Follower of Cazic-Thule (Be Afraid)
Torv Server

Edited, Thu Oct 28 12:42:08 2004
▲ Page top
RE: Turn Attack Off....
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2005 at 1:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591828077492
14 posts
Not sure why you would post a monk hotkey button under an SK spell.. An sk would want to use:
/attack off
/cast <slot#>
I'm not sure if you need the pause command. If so, go ahead and add it in.
▲ Page top
RE: Turn Attack Off....
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2007 at 8:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592342275642
View User Forum
132 posts
I realize that this post is two years late, but..

that isnt really a monk hotkey that he made since monks dont need to stop attacking before they FD.
▲ Page top
Also
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2003 at 1:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789799503
156 posts
I've noticed that while in groups feigning death kills agro instantly on spells that generate immediately. This includes nukes, mez, slow, resist debuff, group taps ETC. This does not include any Damage over time spells. If you feign successfully and have so many dot spells on a mob that when you stand up and the next tick goes off it attacks you. You are WAY over dotting and it will continue to agro you until the other party members can taunt it off you.

For instance I was the parties ghetto mezzer and ghetto slower in a MMC group, I would get agro like nuts from both slowing and mezzing, after they had killed a mob and was about to move to the next I would feign death and as soon as they started fighting I would stand back up and almost completely agroless even though I had mezzed the mob maybe 3 times and slowed it's attacks. Feigning is a great way to charm kite correctly as well.

If your around level 52 waste the time to get your LoY feign, it barely ever fails and will get your abjuration maxed for death peace. Using hte level 16 feign and the 52 feign is a world of difference as far as fail rate goes.
▲ Page top
really good for necros
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2003 at 6:14 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591789751431
175 posts
if ur pet is about to die and u dont have enough to do the pet summon then do this before ur pet dies. easy way to save ur *** when low on mana
▲ Page top
Just like monk feign death
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2003 at 6:30 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
Sometimes even a monks feign death takes a few precious seconds to convince the mob of your demise, so casting this with only a sliver of health left will probably not save your life as the mob will continue to pummel you for a bit before it becomes tired of beating a dead horse, so to speak, and sets off in search of more lively prey.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
So funny
QuoteReply
# Jul 28 2003 at 6:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175454196
5 posts
I happen to have a monk and yes it will take some time to let em know your dead, its funny the way that works, heh =P
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 10 2003 at 12:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This spell gives you a change to make an agressive enemy think you are dead and leave you alone.
Does this spell work??
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2003 at 5:59 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591785467635
8 posts
I've cast it several times, and it's done no good at all. My body falls to the ground, but I obviously don't look dead because those pitiful creatures of Norrath continue to pummel me until I really am dead.

Edited, Sun Feb 2 18:03:23 2003
▲ Page top
Yes, this spell works
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2003 at 6:53 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591767829862
Guru
316 posts
BUT Feign Death always has a chance to fail, whether we're talking about this spell or the Monk skill.

Some very good information about Feign Death is found at this link: Casters Realm -- Feign Death Explained.

I hope that helps you. Best of luck.
▲ Page top
RE: Yes, this spell works
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2003 at 3:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175496031
101 posts
It is true that all FD has a chance to fail, but this spell has a greater chance than death peace - the level 60 one). Death Peace is also much faster casting and shorter reuse timer. All in all this spell will save your butt about 70% of the time and the other 30% you are going down. lol!
▲ Page top
RE: Yes, this spell works
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2003 at 8:29 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591785467635
8 posts
Thank you! That site was very helpful, and now I know why it wasn't working.
▲ Page top
RE: Yes, this spell works
QuoteReply
# Apr 03 2003 at 9:03 PM Rating: Good
LenenaeMcGillicuddy
32 posts
For those of you who still don't know, I'm guessing Aasldiven had Auto-Attack on when he cast the spell (Auto-fail). Took me a while to figure that out with my SK.
____________________________
--
Len
